title: Savory Creamy Irish Potato Stew
description: A hearty and comforting dish perfect for sick days, this savory creamy Irish stew features gluten-free-friendly ingredients including tandoori spices to add a unique twist.

ingredients.name: tandoori seasoning blend
ingredients.notes: such as Garam Masala and other Indian spices

ingredients.name: red wine vinegar
ingredients.notes: lighter option than regular cooking wine for a healthier twist

instructions: Dice the potatoes into chunks and place them in a large pot.
Add chopped onions, celery, garlic, and tandoori seasoning blend to the pot with the potatoes. Stir well to coat evenly.
Pour enough vegetable oil over the ingredients until they are coated. Drizzle 1 tablespoon of unsalted butter along with the oil and toss gently for about a minute.
Season with salt and pepper according to taste, then pour in red wine vinegar and heavy cream. Bring everything together and stir well to combine all ingredients.
Transfer the mixture into an oven-safe dish and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 30-40 minutes or until potatoes are tender and creamy on top.
